name: Mort's French Toast w/ Cream Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Half and half or milk
1/3 cup Marmalade or jam of choice
recipeInstructions:
Sometimes more... Howard made this just last month in honor of his Dad at JAKE'S in Londonderry, VT. It is truly 'baaad' and Mort promised he would eat it only at the restaurant.
1. Combine all ingredients except bread in blender or food processor.
2. Spray a 8-inch square pan with Pam cooking spray or brush with butter.
3. Pour a small amount of batter into the bottom of the pan and arrange 4 slices of bread on top.
4. Spread about half the batter over the bread, then add another 4 slices and pour the remaining batter over them.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
7. Optionally, fill bread with extra chunks of cream cheese, apples or banana slices.
8. Serve with Vermont maple syrup.
